page_content:
Restriction: Permission of CMNS-Applied Mathematics department; and permission of instructor.

AMSC763 Advanced Linear Numerical Analysis (3 Credits)

Advanced topics in numerical linear algebra, such as dense eigenvalue problems, sparse elimination, iterative methods, and other topics. Prerequisite: AMSC666 or CMSC666; or permission of instructor. Cross-listed with: CMSC763.

Credit Only Granted for. AMSC600, AMSC763, CMSC760, or CMSC763. Formerly: AMSC600 and CMSC760.
